nodes.name: 夜鷹目
nodes.summary: 夜鷹目（Caprimulgiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联83种鸟类，如Spotted nightjar、Solomons nightjar、Papuan nightjar等83种鸟类。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 托海
nodes.summary: 托海是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联22种鸟类，包括红头林鹧鸪、Cocos cuckoo、Malaysian eared nightjar等22种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: Malaysian eared nightjar
nodes.summary: Malaysian eared nightjar（Malaysian eared nightjar，学名 Lyncornis temminckii），分类上属于夜鷹目，并归入夜鹰科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于托海、次生林，常见栖息地包括稀树草原，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 夜鹰科
nodes.summary: 夜鹰科（Caprimulgidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联76种鸟类，如Spotted nightjar、Solomons nightjar、Papuan nightjar等76种鸟类。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Their distribution spans Southeast Asia, with notable populations in Malaysia where they are found both in the Peninsula and Malaysian Borneo, recorded to inhabit forests characterised by tall hardwood trees, alluvial forests, grassland, swamplands and dense rainforests. The Malaysian eared nightjars are also largely found in Sumatra, where they occur in both primary and secondary forests. The species is also present across Indonesia, Singapore, Thailand and a small population exists in Southern Myanmar. The varied habitats in which the Malaysian eared nightjars are distributed throughout suggests their superior ability to niche partition and adapt to their environments, whether pristine or human-altered

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: However, its population is declining in Thailand, where the bird used to be dispersed throughout, but is now uncommon to southern regions of the country, due to habitat fragmentation and deforestation. No persistent efforts to repopulate them have been recorded in Thailand

links.label: 属于
links.evidence: Wikidata 分类: Malaysian eared nightjar 属于目 夜鷹目。

links.label: 属于
